title: This Rain Will Never Stop
overview: This Rain Will Never Stop takes the audience on a powerful, visually arresting journey through  humanity’s  endless  cycle  of  war  and  peace.  The  film  follows  20-year-old  Andriy  Suleyman  as  he  tries  to  secure  a  sustainable  future  while  navigating  the  human toll of armed conflict. From the Syrian civil war to strife in Ukraine, Andriy’s existence is framed by the seemingly eternal flow of life and death.
